hint.en: Hint: Mention that PHP stands for Hypertext Preprocessor and is a server-side scripting language designed for web development.
hint.hi: संकेत: बताएं कि PHP एक सर्वर-साइड स्क्रिप्टिंग भाषा है जो वेब विकास के लिए उपयोग की जाती है।
hint.gu: સંકેત: સમજાવો કે PHP એ સર્વર-સાઇડ સ્ક્રિપ્ટીંગ લેંગ્વેજ છે જે વેબ ડેવલપમેન્ટ માટે વપરાય છે।
hint.hi_en: Hint: Batao ki PHP ek server-side scripting language hai jo web development ke liye use hoti hai.
hint.gu_en: Hint: Kaho ke PHP ek server-side scripting language chhe je web development mate use thay chhe.

positive_points: Correctly defined PHP as server-side scripting language
Mentioned it is widely used for web development
missing_points: Could mention that it stands for Hypertext Preprocessor
suggestions: Provide the full form of PHP.
Explain where PHP runs (on the server).
evaluation.improved_answer: PHP (Hypertext Preprocessor) is a widely-used, open-source server-side scripting language designed specifically for web development. It is executed on the server, generating HTML which is then sent to the client.
evaluation.voice_analysis: Speaking speed: 120 WPM. Filler words: None.

hint.en: Hint: Explain that Laravel is a PHP framework based on MVC architecture, offering tools like Eloquent ORM.
hint.hi: संकेत: समझाएं कि Laravel एक PHP फ्रेमवर्क है जो MVC आर्किटेक्चर पर आधारित है और Eloquent ORM जैसे टूल्स प्रदान करता है।
hint.gu: સંકેત: સમજાવો કે Laravel એ એક PHP ફ્રેમવર્ક છે જે MVC આર્કિટેક્ચર પર આધારિત છે।
hint.hi_en: Hint: Explain karo ki Laravel ek MVC pattern pe based PHP framework hai jo tools provide karta hai.
hint.gu_en: Hint: Explain karo ke Laravel ek MVC framework chhe PHP nu.

positive_points: Identified Laravel as a popular PHP framework
Mentioned the MVC architecture design pattern
missing_points: Could mention key features like Eloquent ORM, Routing, and Blade templating engine
suggestions: Highlight the benefits of using a framework over core PHP.
Name a few built-in tools like Eloquent or Artisan.
evaluation.improved_answer: Laravel is a free, open-source PHP web framework created by Taylor Otwell. It follows the Model-View-Controller (MVC) architectural pattern and provides built-in tools for routing, authentication, sessions, caching, and database manipulation via Eloquent ORM.

question.hi_en: Laravel Service Container ko explain karein.
question.gu_en: Laravel Service Container ne explain karo.

hint.en: Hint: Define it as a powerful tool for managing class dependencies and performing dependency injection.
hint.hi: संकेत: इसे क्लास डिपेंडेंसीज को मैनेज करने और डिपेंडेंसी इंजेक्शन करने का एक शक्तिशाली उपकरण बताएं।
hint.gu: સંકેત: આ ક્લાસ ડિપેન્ડન્સી મેનેજ કરવા અને ડિપેન્ડન્સી ઇન્જેક્શન કરવા માટેનું સાધન છે.
hint.hi_en: Hint: Batao ki ye class dependencies manage aur dependency injection karne ka tool hai.
hint.gu_en: Hint: Ene class dependencies manage ane dependency injection no tool tarike explain karo.

positive_points: Explained that Service Container manages class dependencies
missing_points: Could explain the difference between binding and resolving
suggestions: Describe how Laravel auto-resolves dependencies using Reflection.
evaluation.improved_answer: The Laravel Service Container is a powerful tool for managing class dependencies and performing dependency injection. It acts as a registry where you bind classes or interfaces, and resolves them automatically when requested, resolving nested dependencies using PHP's Reflection API.
